inputs.query: Hello, what is your return policy for electronics? And do you offer exchanges?

results.content: Standard return window is 30 days from delivery. Some products (laptop accessories) have 60-day windows. Items must be unused and in original packaging unless defective.
Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days after the return is received and inspected.
Exchanges can be requested within the return window. Subject to stock availability. We ship the replacement first for VIP customers.
If an item arrives damaged, we issue a full refund without requiring the item to be returned. Photos are helpful but not mandatory.
VIP customers have pre-approved return exceptions and receive priority handling. Check customer notes for VIP exception flags.

inputs.message:
Hi Irene Castillo, great question! Here's what you need to know:

**Return Policy**: Standard return window is 30 days from delivery. Some products (laptop accessories) have 60-day windows. Items must be unused and in original packaging unless defective.

**Refund Policy**: Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days after the return is received and inspected.

**Exchange Process**: Exchanges can be requested within the return window. Subject to stock availability. We ship the replacement first for VIP customers.

Feel free to reply if you have more questions!
